title: N2bn Scam: Court Adjourns Trial Of Agric Entrepreneur, Ovaioza To July 12
description: A Federal High Court sitting in Abuja has adjourned the trial of Ovaioza Yunusa who was alleged to be involved in a scam of N2bn to July 12, 2023. The presiding Judge, Justice Gladys Olotu adjourned t
html:
A Federal High Court sitting in Abuja has adjourned the trial of Ovaioza Yunusa who was alleged to be involved in a scam of N2bn to July 12, 2023. The presiding Judge, Justice Gladys Olotu adjourned the case because the defense parties failed to appear before the court when the matter came up Tuesday.

The Federal Government had sued Ovaioza and her company, Ovaioza Farm Produce Storage Business (OFPSB) on charges bordering on Advanced Fee Fraud. Ovaioza along with Imu Yunusa and Goodness Omeiza were alleged to be operating as fund managers without regбґistration by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) among others.

The SEC had in March 2022 sealed up the 27 Abeokuta Street, Garki Abuja office of the compaбґny on suspicions of illegally colбґlecting money from the investing public to the tune of N2bn while not registered with the Commisбґsion.

In the five count charge brought against the company and its promoters by the Federбґal Republic of Nigeria, they were alleged to have on or between the year 2020 and 2022 within the juбґrisdiction of the honourable court did commit a felony to wit: with common intent conspired among themselves together with their staff to do an illegal act.

They were alleged to lure and offer for subscription an unregistered collective investбґment scheme valued over N2bn to the unsuspecting general public including Umejiaku Chiбґkodili Crystal, Omolabake Ale, Dr. Obi Sandra P., Nnaemeka Franklin Ugwoke, Fonon Ismaiбґla Malum, Kelechi Anayo, Nkiru Onyima, and others.

The charge reads, Б─°That you Imu Yunusa, Goodбґness Omeiza and Ovaioza Farm Produce Storage Business; all of house No. 27 Abeokuta Street, Area 8 Garki, on or between the year 2020 and 2022 within the jurisdiction of this honourable court did commit a felony to wit: lured and offered for subscripбґtion an unregistered collective investment scheme valued over N2 billion to the unsuspecting general public including Umeбґjiaku Chikodili Crystal, Omolaбґbake Ale, Dr. Obi Sandra P., Nnaeбґmeka Franklin Ugwoke, Fonon Ismaila Malum, Kelechi Anayo, Nkiru Onyima, and others. You thereby committed an offence contrary to and punishable unбґder Section 54 of the Investments and Securities Act, 2007.

Б─°That you Imu Yunusa, Goodбґness Omeiza and Ovaioza Farm Produce Storage Business; all of house No. 27 Abeokuta Street, Area 8 Garki, on or between the year 2020 and 2022 within the jurisdiction of this honourable court did commit a felony to wit: conspiracy of forming a comбґmon intention amongst yourбґselves together with your staff to do an illegal act diversion of investment funds valued over N2 billion belonging to the investing public including, Umejiaku Chiбґkodili Crystal, Omolabake Ale, Dr. Obi Sandra P., Nnaemeka Franklin Ugwoke, Fonon Ismaiбґla Malum, Kelechi Anayo, Nkiru Onyima, and others. You thereby committed an offence contrary to and punishable under Section 516 of the Criminal Code Act, laws of the Federation of Nigeбґria, 2004. Б─°
